purpose: Stage-1 data-gen ordered attempt frontier (repo-stratified, KILL-D1-firewalled, eligibility-screened SWE-Gym SFT pool).

best_of_k.grows_from: ledger recomputes resolvable = seed_resolvable_families UNION {families with >=1 'resolved' row in attempts.jsonl}; a zero-family that starts resolving auto-earns k_resolvable.

provenance.note: INTERVENTION cycle-2: cycle-1 yield 4/50=0.08 vs probe 0.25 target; full-frontier @0.08-0.12 => max ~165-250 keepers < 400 floor. Re-stratify+best-of-3 to give the resolvable families their shot; kill bar 0.10/200 unchanged (honest death).

belt_lever.note: Verified-adjacent ids prepended to order (exploit head, coverage-first by frontier index) + families seeded resolvable; SWE-Gym head retained at lower priority; explore slice unchanged.

l1_restratify.lever: L1 near-miss best-of-k re-draw as the exploit head
l1_restratify.order_scheme: [near-miss by family-yield desc] + [unattempted by family-yield desc, near-zero last] + [empty re-draw by yield] + [terminal tail resolved/env]
l1_restratify.explore_note: explore POOL data-empty (every family has >=1 resolved row -> all resolvable); 88/12 convention kept in config, coverage lives in exploit.

freshcov_restratify.lever: fresh-coverage probe: never-attempted pandas-dev/getmoto/dask at head
freshcov_restratify.order_scheme: [stratified probe pandas-dev/getmoto/dask 40/35/25] + [remaining unattempted by family-yield desc] + [near-miss re-draws LAST by family-yield desc] + [empty re-draw] + [terminal tail resolved/env]
freshcov_restratify.endgame_rule: >=100 stratified fresh attempts: yield>=0.15 CONTINUE; <0.10 ACCEPT POOL; 0.10-0.15 CONTINUE + hard reassess at +10 cycles.

dropped_from_enforcement.reason: belt-lever relaxation; Verified instances outside all eval rings are now trainable (standard-practice firewall: NO evaluated instance ever trains).
